claim: The model was released in 2023.
evidence: The model was released in 2023. The model was trained on 10B tokens.
label: SUPPORTS

claim: The capital of France is Lyon.
evidence: The capital of France is Paris. France has a population of 67 million.
label: REFUTES

claim: The Eiffel Tower is 300 meters tall.
evidence: The Eiffel Tower is 330 meters tall. It was built in 1889.
label: REFUTES

claim: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.
evidence: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius. Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius.
label: SUPPORTS

claim: The supplement boosts energy.
evidence: Ads claim the supplement boosts energy in 90% of users. A clinical trial found no significant effect over placebo.
label: REFUTES

claim: The company had exactly $5B in revenue.
evidence: The company reported $5B in revenue. The same period showed $3B per alternative accounting.
label: NOT ENOUGH INFO

claim: The city has a population density of 4000 per sq km.
evidence: The city has a population of 2 million. The city covers 500 square kilometers. The city was founded in 1800.
label: SUPPORTS

claim: The car traveled 150 miles.
evidence: The car travels at 60 mph. The trip takes 3 hours. There was a 30-minute rest stop.
label: REFUTES

claim: Python was created by Dennis Ritchie.
evidence: Python was created by Guido van Rossum. Python 1.0 was released in 1994.
label: REFUTES

claim: The politician's claims match government data.
evidence: The politician claims unemployment is at a 10-year low. Government statistics show unemployment rose from 4% to 6%.
label: REFUTES

claim: Mount Everest is exactly 9000 meters high.
evidence: Mount Everest is 8848 meters high. It is located in Nepal and Tibet.
label: REFUTES

claim: The speed of light is approximately 300 million m/s.
evidence: The speed of light is 299792458 m/s. Light travels fastest in vacuum.
label: REFUTES

claim: The Great Pyramid was built around 2560 BC.
evidence: The Great Pyramid was built around 2560 BC. It is located in Giza, Egypt.
label: SUPPORTS

claim: Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
evidence: Tokyo is the capital of Japan. Japan has a population of 125 million.
label: SUPPORTS

claim: The recipe uses exactly 2 cups of flour.
evidence: The recipe requires flour, eggs, and milk. The cake should bake at 350F for 30 minutes.
label: NOT ENOUGH INFO

claim: The Dead Sea is 500 meters below sea level.
evidence: The Dead Sea is 430 meters below sea level. It is one of the saltiest bodies of water.
label: REFUTES

claim: Shakespeare wrote Hamlet.
evidence: Shakespeare wrote Hamlet in 1601. Hamlet is set in Denmark.
label: SUPPORTS

claim: The first iPhone was released in 2005.
evidence: The first iPhone was released in 2007. It was announced by Steve Jobs.
label: REFUTES

claim: The company is hiring aggressively.
evidence: The company blog says they are hiring aggressively. LinkedIn shows headcount decreased by 10%.
